title: Potion of Armor
description: Adds a new Potion of Armor that has 4 levels and gives you passive armor without equipping armor
body:
Potion of Armor adds potions that give armor stats equivalent to their corresponding chestplates.

- Potion of Armor - Equivalent of a Leather Chestplate
- Potion of Iron Armor - Equivalent of a Iron Chestplate
- Potion of Diamond Armor - Equivalent of a Diamond Chestplate
- Potion of Netherite Armor - Equivalent of a Netherite Chestplate

## Crafting
To craft a Potion of Armor, brew an awkward potion with a Leather Chestplate.

To upgrade it to Iron or Diamond, brew a Potion of Armor with an Iron or Diamond Block. To upgrade it to Netherite, brew a Potion of Armor with a Netherite Scrap
